verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah
“Aaron leh a tapate in keima min siangtho a daisak lohna dingun amaute in keima tungah a hong ap uh ahi, Israel mite' piak a siangthote panin a kikepna dingun gen in; kei pen Topa ka hi hi

Amaute kiangah, ‘Na suanlekhakte uh sung panin a khangkhangin khatpeuh in a nit laitakin Israel mite in Topa' tungah a ap a siangtho nate a naih leh keima omna panin tuapa kihawlkhia ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi

“‘Aaron' gui sung panin meima nei leh a natui a paikhia mi peuhmah in amah a siangtho mateng a siangtho an ne theilo ding hi. Misi lawn'na hita leh a natui a tehpa lawn'na hita leh a nin na khat peuhpeuh a lawngpa
amah a nit theihna dingin a bokvak ganhing khat hita leh nitna a ngah theihna ding mi khat hita leh a lawngpa, ama nitna pen bangbang hita leh
tua bang na a lawng mipa pen a nitak mateng a nin hi ding a, amah in tui sungah a pumpi a sil kei leh a siangtho an nelo ding hi
Ni a tum ciangin amah siang ding a, tua khit ciangin amah in a siangtho an ne thei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua bangte pen ama nek ding mah ahi hi
A mawk sihte hita leh gamsate in a balgawpte hita leh amah in tuate nekna tawh amah kininsaklo ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi, ci hi,’ ci in
“Tua ahih ciangin amaute in ka thuhilhna zui ding uh hi. Tua hi kei leh amaute in tua thu a daisak uh ciangin khialhna thuakin sihpih ding uh hi. Amaute a siangthosakpa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi
“A pualam mi in a siangtho an nelo ding hi. Siampipa' inn-ah a om peemta ahi a, a kicial nasemte in ahi zongin a siangtho an nelo ding hi
Ahih hangin siampipa khat in ama-a' dingin sum tawh sila khat a lei leh, tua a sila in ne thei ding hi. Ama inn sungah a suak mite in ama an ne thei ding uh hi
Siampipa' tanu khat a pualam mi khat tawh a kiten' leh tuanu in a siangtho biakna an ne theilo ding hi

Ahih hangin siampipa' tanu pen meigong ahi a, a kima ahi zongin, ta neiloin a nungak lai mah bangin a pa' inn-ah a ciahkik leh, tuanu in a pa' an ne thei ding hi. Ahi zongin a pualam mi kuamah in tua an ne theilo ding hi
“Mi khat in theihlohna hangin a siangtho an khat peuhpeuh a nekkhak leh, tua a na manzah seh nga-ah seh khat behlapin, siampipa tungah a siangtho an man pia ding hi
Amaute in Topa' tungah a piak ahi, Israel-te' an a siangtho pen siampite in ninsaklo ding uh a
tua bangin amau' an a siangthote nekna tawh mawhna leh khialhna amaute puasak lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen amaute a siangthosak Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah

“Aaron leh a tapate leh Israel mi khempeuh tungah hih bangin gen in: Israel mite sung panin ahi zongin Israel mite sungah a peem mite lak pan ahi zongin mi khatpeuh in biakna a piak ciangin, thuciamna a tun'sakna hita leh meihal biakna-in Topa' tungah a kipia utthu-a biakna hita leh
hong kisan' theihna dingin bawngtal hita leh tuu hita leh keel hita leh, a sitbaanglo a pa khat na pia ding uh hi
Note in a sitbaang khat peuhpeuh na pia kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hong kisang zolo ding hi

Mi khatpeuh in bawnghon panin ahi a, tuulekeel hon panin ahi zongin thuciamna tun'sakna ding hita leh utthu-a biakna-in hita leh Topa' tungah thunuama biakna a piak ciangin, a kisan' theihna dingin a ganhing a cidam hi ding a, sitbaan'na a omlo hi ding hi

Ganhing a mittaw, a gamtang theilo, a hem, meima nai a nei, cithak ahih kei leh meima a neite pen, note in Topa' tungah pialoin, Topa' tungah mei tawh kihal biakna-in biakna tau tungah tuate na zang kei ding uh hi

Bawngtal hita leh tuuno hita leh a na khat peuhpeuh a saulua ahih kei leh a tomluate pen note in utthu-a biakna-in na pia thei ding uh hi. Ahih hangin thuciamna tun'sakna-a piak dingin tua bangte kisang zolo hi
A ciltangte a sa-nim, a kisuzan, a kitam, ahih kei leh a ki-atkhia ganhing khat peuhpeuh, note in Topa' tungah pialoin, na gamsung uhah biakna-in na zang kei ding uh hi
“Gamdang mite khat peuhpeuh tung panin a kingah ganhingte zong na Pasian uh' an dingin note in na pia kei ding uh hi. Amaute sitbaang a, hem ahih manin tuate hong kisang zolo ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Bawng ahih kei leh tuu ahih kei leh keel khat a suah ciangin a pi tawh ni sagih sung omkhawm ding hi. A ni giat ni-a kipanin tua ganno pen Topa' tungah mei tawh kihal biakna-in kisang thei ding hi
A pi pen bawng hita leh tuu hita leh, note in a pi leh a no ni khat sungin na gokhawm kei ding uh hi
Note in Topa' tungah lungdam koh biakna na piak uh ciangin, note hong kisan' theihna dingin na pia ding uh hi
A tua ni mahin kine ding a, note in zingsang dong sit na nei kei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi
“Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thupiaknate zui-in tuate na sem ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi
Note in keima min siangtho na daisak kei ding uh a, Israel mite lakah kei hong kisiangthosak ding hi. Kei pen note a hong siangthosak Topa
note' Pasian ahi dingin Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpihpa ka hi hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi.
